name: Bullhorn Staffing & Recruiting CRM API
what_it_does: Bullhorn REST API for staffing and recruiting CRM/ATS platform. Enables AI agents to manage candidate and contact records, retrieve job orders and placement data, access client relationship data, manage recruitment workflows and pipelines, retrieve timecard and payroll data for temporary workers, access placement and revenue analytics, integrate with job boards and sourcing tools, manage compliance and onboarding data, and connect staffing operations with VMS platforms and MSP workflows.
use_cases: Managing candidate sourcing and placement workflows from recruiting automation agents
Accessing client job orders and staffing requirements from account management agents
Retrieving placement and revenue analytics from staffing operations agents
Integrating timecard data with payroll systems from workforce management agents
not_for: Corporate internal HR without staffing agency business model
Permanent placement without temp/contract staffing workflows
HR management without recruiting pipeline and placement focus
best_when: A staffing agency, recruiting firm, or RPO provider using Bullhorn wants AI agents to automate candidate management, job matching, placement workflows, and client relationship management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate PII including work history, references, and compensation data is highly sensitive. Automated sourcing and outreach must comply with GDPR, CCPA, and CAN-SPAM. VMS integrations handle sensitive billing data.

auth.notes: Bullhorn uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Corporation-level credentials with user-level scopes. REST API requires session token obtained via OAuth flow. Active developer community. Marketplace partner program for integrations. Good API documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — staffing enterprise CRM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; enterprise pricing for large agencies
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. Founded 1999. Market leader for staffing and recruiting CRM. Used by 10,000+ staffing firms globally. Acquired by Insight Venture Partners. Strong VMS integration ecosystem. Competes with Avionte, JobDiva, and Vincere. Global presence with GDPR compliance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII and work history data requires GDPR/CCPA compliance
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with session token
Session token pattern — OAuth login then separate REST session token exchange required
GDPR compliance mandatory for EU candidate data — right to erasure applies to candidate records
VMS integration (Fieldglass, Beeline) requires separate connector setup
Automated sourcing and outreach must comply with CAN-SPAM and TCPA
agent_readiness.security_notes: Candidate PII and staffing data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency. Candidate right to erasure applies. Global staffing compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate PII and staffing data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. Multi-region. Candidate erasure rights.
